---
format: {}
title: Stats with Clojure
author: Karthikeyan A K
toc: true
toc-depth: 4
number-sections: true
theme: quarto

---
<style></style><style>.printedClojure .sourceCode {
  background-color: transparent;
  border-style: none;
}
</style><style>.clay-limit-image-width .clay-image {max-width: 100%}
.clay-side-by-side .sourceCode {margin: 0}
.clay-side-by-side {margin: 1em 0}
</style>
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script><script src="https://code.jquery.com/ui/1.13.1/jquery-ui.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script>

# Mean 

$$
\mu = \frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i}{n}
$$


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(def numbers [1 17 4 -7 6 12 -15 4 10 12])
```
:::


$$
\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i
$$


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(apply + numbers)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
44

```
:::


$$
n
$$


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(count numbers)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
10

```
:::


$$
\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i}{n}
$$


::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(/ (apply + numbers) (count numbers))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
22/5

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(float (/ (apply + numbers) (count numbers)))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
4.4

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(defn mean [numbers]
  (float (/ (apply + numbers) (count numbers))))
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(mean numbers)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
4.4

```
:::



## Visualizing the mean 


```{=html}
<div style="background-color:grey;height:2px;width:100%;"></div>
```



```{=html}
<div><pre><small><small>source: <a href="https://github.com/scicloj/stats_with_clojure/blob/main/notebooks/mean.clj">notebooks/mean.clj</a></small></small></pre></div>
```
